title: bauhinia pansamalana
intro: Bauhinia pansamalana is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, native to the Philippines. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bauhinia pansamalana include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, while also being used as a natural remedy for wounds and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Bauhinia pansamalana often involve boiling the plant's roots or leaves in water to create a tea or decoction, which is then consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
